one_time_description: Gain on investments (Yinka Dene Economic Development Limited Partnership accumulated equity increase)
economic_notes: Nation holds investment in Yinka Dene Economic Development Limited Partnership (modified equity method, value $17,325,089). Also holds units in FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership and FN (PTP) General Partner Inc.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to failure to identify Asset Retirement Obligations (ARO) liabilities as required under PSAS Section PS 3280. This qualification also applied to prior year 2023. Restricted cash includes housing reserves ($116,240), forestry deposit ($384), and secured revenue trust account ($3,725). Investments in Yinka Dene Economic Development LP valued at $17,325,089 using modified equity method — large unrealized gain of $6,074,787 drives high surplus. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Carrier Sekani Family Services + CMHC + First Nations Health Authority + Northern Health Authority + PGNAETA + Province of BC = $6,467,335. OSR = Other and resources + Ottawa Trust funds + Rent and sales = $8,763,058. No remuneration schedule included in the provided financial statements.
